hero.subtitle: Lightweight Development Service for the Japanese Market
hero.description: We create high-quality websites in as little as 2 days with overwhelmingly reasonable pricing that startups and SMEs can afford without strain.

lowPrice.title: Overwhelmingly Low Prices
lowPrice.description: AI utilization and global talent achieve overwhelmingly reasonable prices compared to competitors. Final quality is guaranteed by Japanese PMs.

speed.title: Super Fast - From 2 Days
speed.description: Ultra-fast production through AI-assisted work efficiency and 24-hour support system leveraging global engineer networks.

transparency.title: Complete Transparency
transparency.description: All infrastructure costs including domains, servers, and APIs are transparently presented at actual cost. No hidden fees whatsoever.

pricing.title: Pricing Example
pricing.subtitle: High-quality websites at half the price of competitors

campaign.title: Half Price of Competitor's Quote
campaign.description: Provide an official quote from a competitor, and we will complete the project for 50% of the listed price. Applicability will be confirmed after we review the quote to ensure the scope of work matches our service offerings.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Zero initial cost. Safe payment after delivery completion.
cta.note: Payment after delivery completion meeting agreed requirements at contract

service.title: Our Services
service.subtitle: Website creation that achieves maximum results with minimum cost

corporate.title: Corporate & Brand Sites
corporate.description: We create high-quality corporate and brand sites that enhance your company's credibility.

landing.title: Landing Pages (LP)
landing.description: We create effective landing pages designed to maximize conversion rates.

policy.title: Project Selection Policy
policy.minAmount: Minimum contract amount: Generally 5 pages or more for ¥170,000+
policy.scope: Scope: Static websites, brand sites, LPs, etc.
policy.nonScope: Non-supported: E-commerce sites, membership functions, large-scale CMS, 50+ page structures
policy.timeline: Timeline: Quote within 2 business days / Delivery in 2-10 business days

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Transparent and clear pricing for peace of mind

comparison.title: Price Comparison
comparison.description: Overwhelmingly low prices compared to typical development companies

noInitialCost.title: Zero Initial Cost
noInitialCost.description: Payment after delivery completion meeting agreed requirements at contract. Judged based on agreed content, not satisfaction.

halfPrice.title: Limited Campaign
halfPrice.description: Present us with a formal quote from another company, and we'll provide service at half that price (subject to content review)

transparency.title: Complete Transparency in Maintenance Costs
transparency.description: All infrastructure costs including domains, servers, APIs, and email are transparently presented and settled at actual cost.
transparency.note: We counter the industry's common business model of 'showing low initial costs and charging high maintenance fees' by eliminating opaque profit structures.

works.title: Our Works
works.description: Here are some of the websites we have created.

daisoubus.title: Daiso Kanko Bus
daisoubus.description: A bilingual (Japanese/English) corporate site aimed at enhancing brand image and credibility.
features: Automated email dispatch for inquiry forms

mononest.title: MONONEST E-commerce Brand Site
mononest.description: An official e-commerce brand site that expresses the brand's worldview and maximizes the appeal of its products.

step1.title: Inquiry & Consultation
step1.description: Please feel free to contact us via form or email. We'll conduct a hearing about your desired content, budget, and timeline.

step2.title: Proposal & Quote
step2.description: Based on the hearing, we'll submit a structural plan and quote. If you have quotes from other companies, we'll also advise on campaign applicability.

step3.title: Contract & Production Start
step3.description: Once you're satisfied with the content, we'll conclude a formal contract and begin production.

step4.title: Design/Development & Review
step4.description: We proceed in order: Top page design confirmation → Sub-page design → Coding → Testing.

step5.title: Delivery & Billing
step5.description: After final confirmation and ensuring agreed requirements are met, we deliver. Invoice issued after delivery completion.

step6.title: Operation & Support (as needed)
step6.description: We provide ongoing support for infrastructure setup and minor updates as desired. Separate consultation for maintenance contracts.

positioning.title: Positioning
positioning.description: MiniMaxCode is a lightweight development service brand for the Japanese market.

resultOriented.title: Result-Oriented
resultOriented.description: Big results with small investments. Pursuing reliable and speedy results with minimum cost.

aiUtilization.title: AI Utilization
aiUtilization.description: Fast and smart creation with AI × expert teams. Streamlining operations with AI assistance and collaborating with global talent.

phaseSupport.title: Phase-Based Approach
phaseSupport.description: Optimal start for your current scale. Begin small with necessary functions and expand as you grow.

overview.title: Overview
overview.content: MiniMaxCode (hereinafter referred to as "the Company") recognizes the protection of customer's personal information as a significant responsibility, complies with the Personal Information Protection Act and other relevant laws, and handles customers' personal information appropriately.

collection.title: Collection of Personal Information
collection.content:
The Company may collect personal information in the following cases:
• When entered in the contact form
• When applying for services
• During email correspondence
• Other times when using the Company's services

usage.title: Purpose of Use of Personal Information
usage.content:
Collected personal information will be used for the following purposes:
• To respond to inquiries
• To provide services and fulfill contracts
• For after-sales support
• To send important notices

protection.title: Protection of Personal Information
protection.content: The Company will implement appropriate security measures to prevent leakage, loss, or damage of personal information.

disclosure.title: Disclosure to Third Parties
disclosure.content: The Company will not disclose personal information to third parties without the customer's consent, except as required by law.

contact.title: Inquiries
contact.content: For inquiries regarding the handling of personal information, please contact us via the contact form.

overview.title: Overview
overview.content: These Terms of Service (hereinafter referred to as "these Terms") establish the terms of use for the services provided by MiniMaxCode (hereinafter referred to as "the Company").

service.title: Service Content
service.content: The Company provides website creation and related services. Specific service details will be determined by individual contracts.

contract.title: Formation of Contract
contract.content: A contract shall be formed when the customer expresses their acceptance of the quotation provided by the Company.

payment.title: Fees and Payment
payment.content: The fee shall be the amount stipulated at the time of the contract, and an invoice will be issued upon completion of delivery. Payment is requested within 30 days of the invoice date.

delivery.title: Delivery Date and Delivery
delivery.content: The delivery date will be as stipulated at the time of the contract, and the Company will strive to adhere to the delivery date with the due care of a good manager.

warranty.title: Warranty and Liability
warranty.content: The Company will perform minor corrections on the deliverables free of charge for 30 days after delivery. However, corrections involving changes to specifications may incur additional charges.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property Rights
intellectual.content: The copyright of the deliverables shall belong to the customer upon full payment of the fee. However, programs and templates independently developed by the Company shall remain the property of the Company.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Acts
prohibited.content:
The following acts are prohibited:
• Acts that violate laws and regulations
• Acts that infringe upon the rights of third parties
• Acts that damage the credibility of the Company
• Other acts that the Company deems inappropriate

termination.title: Termination of Contract
termination.content: If the customer violates these Terms, the Company may terminate the contract without notice.

changes.title: Changes to the Terms
changes.content: The Company may change these Terms as necessary. The revised terms will take effect once they are posted on this site.
